sha256:a3acd59c42280cd431d118861711c7753: query CollectionPage($releaseLimit: Int!, $slug: String!) { collection(slug: $slug) { dailySummaries { date releaseCount summary takeaways title } dailySummaryEnabled description isFeatured members { __typename ... on CollectionMemberOrg { avatarUrl description domain githubHandle name slug } ... on CollectionMemberProduct { description name org { avatarUrl domain githubHandle name slug } slug } } name releases(limit: $releaseLimit) { items { composition { bugs enhancements features } content coverageCount groupName groupSlug id media { alt r2Url type url } org { name slug } prerelease product { name slug } publishedAt source { name slug type } summary title titleGenerated titleShort type url version } nextCursor } slug } }
sha256:b5f9fa07fd60f90839b1f976d11632029: query HomepageAllOrgs($limit: Int!) { orgs(includeEmpty: false, limit: $limit) { items { avatarUrl domain lastActivity name recentReleaseCount releaseCount slug sourceCount sparkline topProducts } } }
sha256:eb30575702a89df06aadfc4035de798b9: query HomepageCollections($featured: Boolean) { collections(featured: $featured) { description isFeatured memberCount name previewMembers { __typename ... on CollectionMemberOrg { avatarUrl githubHandle name slug } ... on CollectionMemberProduct { name org { avatarUrl githubHandle name slug } slug } } slug } }
sha256:46fa99b87fe2392f5f59b0508a47fa516: query HomepageOrgsStats($featuredLimit: Int!) { featuredOrgs: orgs(featured: true, limit: $featuredLimit) { items { avatarUrl domain lastActivity name recentReleaseCount releaseCount slug sourceCount sparkline topProducts } } stats { orgs releases sources } }
sha256:eb15101c1fc45e4d3bc46bceb18b929e8: query HomepageTicker($exclude: [SourceType!]!, $limit: Int!) { latestReleases(limit: $limit, excludeSourceTypes: $exclude) { items { id publishedAt source { appStore { iconUrl platform } org { avatarUrl name slug } product { name slug } video { provider } } title titleGenerated titleShort version } } }
sha256:2f85eba030a7a519bf72cab12801afad3: query OrgCollections($idOrSlug: String!) { org(idOrSlug: $idOrSlug) { collections { description isFeatured memberCount name slug } } }
sha256:0a7f1743532d73eb26d165eeac9401c8e: query OrgPage($idOrSlug: String!) { org(idOrSlug: $idOrSlug) { accounts { handle platform } aliases autoGenerateContent avatarUrl avgReleasesPerWeek category description discovery domain featured fetchPaused id isHidden lastFetchedAt lastPolledAt locations name notice overviewCadenceDays products { createdAt description id kind name releaseCount slug sourceCount url } releaseCount releasesLast30Days slug sourceCount sources { appStore { iconUrl platform } changeDetectedAt consecutiveErrors consecutiveNoChange createdAt discovery fetchPriority id isHidden isPrimary kind lastFetchedAt lastPolledAt lastRetieredAt latestAddedAt latestDate latestVersion medianGapDays metadata name nextFetchAfter product { name slug } releaseCount slug stars starsFetchedAt type url video { provider } } status tags trackingSince } }
sha256:04d43cffb2dc13964cd3ebc5a6c7acdf5: query OrgReleases($limit: Int!, $orgIdOrSlug: String!) { latestReleases(orgIdOrSlug: $orgIdOrSlug, limit: $limit) { items { breaking content fetchedAt id media { alt r2Url type url } prerelease publishedAt source { appStore { iconUrl platform } name product { name slug } slug type video { provider } } summary title titleGenerated titleShort type url version } nextCursor } }
sha256:8bbe4adb3c5316c7a9bf8b4daf1d86359: query ProductPage($id: String!, $releaseLimit: Int!) { latestReleases(productId: $id, limit: $releaseLimit) { items { breaking content fetchedAt id media { alt r2Url type url } prerelease publishedAt source { appStore { iconUrl platform } name product { name slug } slug type video { provider } } summary title titleGenerated titleShort type url version } nextCursor } product(id: $id) { category collections { description isFeatured memberCount name slug } description id name notice { coordinate href linkText message } slug sources { id isHidden metadata name slug type url } tags url } }
sha256:1c550e19778eebf6f75b60652d1d32754: query ReleaseDetail($idOrUrl: String!) { release(idOrUrl: $idOrUrl) { composition { bugs enhancements features } content fetchedAt id media { alt r2Url type url } migrationNotes publishedAt source { appStore { iconUrl platform } isHidden name org { avatarUrl discovery isHidden name slug } product { name slug } slug type video { provider } } summary title titleGenerated titleShort type url version } }
sha256:a9b727e50ab142ce7aa42763f0faa91f1: query SourceDetail($id: String!, $releaseLimit: Int!) { source(id: $id) { changelogUrl discovery hasChangelogFile id isHidden lastFetchedAt lastPolledAt latestDate latestVersion metadata name notice { coordinate href linkText message } org { id name slug } productId releases(limit: $releaseLimit) { content fetchedAt id media { alt r2Url type url } publishedAt summary title titleGenerated titleShort type url version } slug summaries { monthly { generatedAt month releaseCount summary windowDays year } rolling { generatedAt month releaseCount summary windowDays year } } trackingSince type url } }
